descriptionHtml:
Dufour 520 GL for sale 2018 | 4 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

This Dufour 520 GL for sale 2018 offers an appealing opportunity for anyone seeking a spacious, modern cruising yacht in good condition. With careful ongoing maintenance, several recent upgrades, and a host of comfort and convenience features, this yacht is well-suited for family coastal cruising or extended adventures. Located in Athens and flying the Greek flag, she is available for immediate viewings.

General Specifications:

  • Model: Dufour 520 Grand Large
  • Year Built: 2018
  • Location: Athens, Greece
  • Flag: Greek
  • Condition: Good

Dimensions:

  • Length Overall (LOA): 15.20 m
  • Beam: 4.8 m
  • Draft: 2.3 m
  • Number of Cabins: 4
  • Number of Berths: 10
  • Heads (Toilets): 3
  • Onboard Capacity: 10 persons

Sails and Rigging:

  • Mainsail: Fully battened, new in 2025
  • Genoa: Roller type, new in 2024

Engine and Propulsion:

  • Engine: Volvo Penta D275F
  • Power: 75 hp
  • Sail Drive
  • Engine Hours: 2,100 (as of November 2025)

Navigation and Equipment:

  • Plotter: Yes
  • GPS: Yes
  • Autopilot: Lewmar
  • Instrument Brand: Raymarine (full set)
  • Steering Wheels: 2

Comfort and Interior Features:

  • Air Conditioning: 3 units
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Microwave: Yes
  • Coffee Maker: Nespresso
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Heads: 3

Utility and Onboard Systems:

  • Generator: Fischer Panda
  • Watermaker: 65 litres/hour
  • Electric Windlass: Yes
  • Bowthruster: Yes
  • Batteries: Information not specified
  • Dinghy: Yes
  • Outboard: Yes

Tanks:

  • Fuel Tank Capacity: 450 litres
  • Water Tank Capacity: 700 litres

Audio and Connectivity:

  • Sound System: Radio, MP3 player, cockpit speakers

Deck and Safety:

  • Professional maintenance
  • VAT status: Not paid
  • Safety equipment: Not detailed; recommended to confirm on viewing.

Recent Upgrades and Highlights:

  • Fully battened mainsail replaced in 2025
  • Roller genoa replaced in 2024
  • Volvo Penta engine has a reasonable 2,100 hours as of November 2025, with regular maintenance
  • Fischer Panda generator for independence at anchor
  • Full set of Raymarine navigation instruments
  • Modern comforts including three air conditioning units, electric fridge, microwave, and Nespresso coffee maker
  • Watermaker ensures autonomy for longer passages
  • Electric windlass and bowthruster support easier handling and mooring
  • Spacious layout across four cabins and three heads, providing privacy and comfort for up to 10 guests
  • Bimini and deck shower extend onboard enjoyment in warm climates

The Dufour 520 GL for sale 2018 is in good condition and ready for her next owner. Well equipped for both sailing performance and liveaboard comfort, she is an ideal choice for Mediterranean cruising. For more information or to arrange a viewing, please get in touch.
